calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-10-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/E. Estacio, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Saul M.Ferster, Esq. for Plaintiff: The Gruber Partners, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: David Beaupre as follows:
Past due rents and damages in the sum of $12,618.00
Prejudgment Interest in the amount of $826.21 from 6/17/2005 to Feb. 10,2005
Cost of suit per Memorandum of Costs.
Judgment signed in open court.
